data.title: Jade Road Investments Reports H1 2025 Loss and Announces Strategic Partnership
data.description:
Jade Road Investments ( (GB:JADE) ) has shared an announcement.

Jade Road Investments reported a net loss of US$0.438 million for the first half of 2025, reflecting limited activity following the divestment of its assets in 2024. The company announced a strategic partnership with NOIA Capital, which acquired an 83% stake through a £1.2 million investment. This partnership aims to redirect Jade Road’s investment focus towards mid/late-stage technology businesses, leveraging NOIA’s expertise. The company plans to deploy the capital in line with its new investing policy by November 2025 to avoid delisting from AIM.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:JADE) stock is a Sell with a £1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jade Road Investments stock, see the GB:JADE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:JADE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:JADE is a Underperform.

Jade Road Investments is facing severe financial and operational challenges. The most significant factor is its poor financial performance, characterized by negative profitability and high leverage. Technical analysis also indicates a bearish trend, and the valuation metrics are unfavorable. Recent corporate events further exacerbate the company’s precarious position.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:JADE stock, click here.

More about Jade Road Investments

Jade Road Investments Limited, listed on the AIM Market of the London Stock Exchange, is a diversified investment vehicle focusing on providing shareholders with attractive uncorrelated, risk-adjusted long-term returns. The company primarily backs its global financing strategy with real assets, emphasizing income production and risk-adjusted returns.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £443K

data.title: Ashoka WhiteOak Expands Share Capital with New Equity Issuance
data.description:
Ashoka Whiteoak Emerging Markets Trust Plc ( (GB:AWEM) ) has shared an update.

Ashoka WhiteOak Emerging Markets Trust plc has announced the issuance of 125,000 new ordinary shares at a price of 145.0 pence per share, which is above the current net asset value. This issuance increases the company’s total share capital to 38,124,329 ordinary shares, impacting shareholder calculations under the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

data.title: Terra Clean Energy Expands Uranium Portfolio with Utah Acquisitions
data.description:
Tisdale Resources Corp ( (TSE:TCEC) ) just unveiled an update.

Terra Clean Energy Corp., a company focused on uranium assets, has entered into definitive agreements to acquire full interest in uranium claims located in Emery County, Utah. This acquisition enhances Terra’s portfolio in renowned uranium basins, demonstrating its commitment to expanding its low-risk uranium assets. The agreements involve a series of cash payments, common share issuances, and exploration expenditures over several years, with the potential for Terra to purchase a portion of the royalties retained by the vendors.

More about Tisdale Resources Corp

Average Trading Volume: 234,116

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$5.85M

data.title: Frasers Hospitality Trust Announces Privatization and Delisting Plans
data.description:
Frasers Hospitality Trust ( (SG:ACV) ) has issued an announcement.

Frasers Hospitality Trust announced its proposed privatization through a trust scheme of arrangement, leading to its delisting from the Singapore Exchange on October 6, 2025. The Monetary Authority of Singapore has approved the withdrawal of FH-REIT’s authorization as a collective investment scheme, and granted an exemption from winding up the trust, impacting its operational structure and market presence.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:ACV) stock is a Hold with a S$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Frasers Hospitality Trust stock, see the SG:ACV Stock Forecast page.

More about Frasers Hospitality Trust

Frasers Hospitality Trust comprises Frasers Hospitality Real Estate Investment Trust and Frasers Hospitality Business Trust, both established in 2014 under Singaporean law. The company operates in the real estate investment sector, focusing on hospitality assets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,324,118

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$1.37B

For an in-depth examination of ACV stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: United Company RUSAL Schedules Board Meeting for Transaction Approval
data.description:
United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has provided an update.

United Company RUSAL has announced the scheduling of a board of directors meeting on September 25, 2025, to discuss the approval of a transaction as per the company’s charter. This announcement reflects the company’s ongoing corporate governance activities and may have implications for its strategic decisions and stakeholder interests.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company incorporated under the laws of Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation. It is primarily involved in the aluminum industry, focusing on the production and sale of aluminum and related products, with a significant market presence in Russia and listings on the Moscow Exchange and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Stearman Resources Rebrands to UraniumX Discovery Corp. Amid Strategic Shift
data.description:
Stearman Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:STMN) ) has issued an announcement.

Stearman Resources Inc. has announced a strategic rebranding to UraniumX Discovery Corp. to emphasize its focus on uranium exploration projects in Saskatchewan’s Northern Athabasca Basin. This move aligns with the company’s commitment to supporting global electrification initiatives. The rebranding includes a new website launch to enhance stakeholder engagement and transparency. Additionally, the company has raised CAD$228,000 through warrant exercises and engaged two firms for marketing and strategic development services, indicating a proactive approach to business growth and market positioning.

More about Stearman Resources, Inc.

Stearman Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral properties in Canada and the USA. The company holds a 100% interest in the NeoCore Uranium Property and the Zoo Bay Uranium Property, as well as an option for up to a 70% interest in the Murphy Lake Uranium Property, all located in the Athabasca Basin in northern Saskatchewan.

Average Trading Volume: 79,311

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Find detailed analytics on STMN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Emkay Global Joins ‘Saksham Niveshak’ Campaign to Protect Shareholder Dividends
data.description:
Emkay Global Financial Services Limited ( (IN:EMKAY) ) has shared an update.

Emkay Global Financial Services Limited has announced its participation in the ‘Saksham Niveshak’ campaign, a 100-day initiative launched by the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority under the Ministry of Corporate Affairs. The campaign aims to engage shareholders to update their KYC details and claim any unpaid or unclaimed dividends to prevent their transfer to the Investor Education and Protection Fund. This initiative reflects the company’s commitment to shareholder engagement and compliance with regulatory directives, potentially enhancing shareholder trust and safeguarding their financial interests.

More about Emkay Global Financial Services Limited

Emkay Global Financial Services Limited operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of financial products and services. The company focuses on investment banking, asset management, and advisory services, catering to a diverse clientele in the financial market.

Average Trading Volume: 6,109

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 8.06B INR

data.title: Morarjee Textiles Continues Insolvency Resolution Efforts
data.description:
Morarjee Textiles Limited ( (IN:MORARJEE) ) just unveiled an update.

Morarjee Textiles Limited has announced the holding of its Twenty Eighth Meeting of the Committee of Creditors on September 12, 2025, as part of its ongoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process. This development is significant as it indicates the company’s continued efforts to resolve its financial difficulties under the guidance of the appointed resolution professional, impacting its stakeholders and market position.

More about Morarjee Textiles Limited

Morarjee Textiles Limited is part of the Ashok Piramal Group and operates in the textile industry. The company is currently undergoing a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code 2016, with its business and assets managed by an appointed resolution professional.

data.title: Quantum Healthcare Ltd. Capitalizes Directors’ Fees to Issue New Shares
data.description:
The latest update is out from Quantum Healthcare Ltd. ( (SG:V8Y) ).

Quantum Healthcare Ltd. has announced an agreement to capitalize part of the outstanding director’s fees owed to Mr. Sho Kian Hin, a former independent director. The company will issue 58,157,091 new shares to Mr. Sho at a premium price to settle S$63,972.80 of the fees, leaving a balance of S$15,993.20. This move reflects the company’s strategic financial management and aims to maintain shareholder value by considering potential dilution and aligning with previous capitalisation terms.

More about Quantum Healthcare Ltd.

Quantum Healthcare Ltd., incorporated in Singapore, operates in the healthcare industry, focusing on providing medical services and products through its subsidiaries.

Current Market Cap: S$16.03M

See more insights into V8Y stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
